Metadata.Changelog:
[>] Updated to version-4aeb17bd13994560
[>] Added closure option for setstackhidden
[>] Enabled Drawing library for Actor environment

[>] Updated to version-4aeb17bd13994560
[>] Added closure option for setstackhidden
[>] Enabled Drawing library for Actor environment

[>] oth library has reached stable version :tada:
[>] Reworked entire logic of oth.hook
[>] List of functions that run on original thread inside oth hook:
- debug*(level)
- getnamecallmethod and setnamecallmethod
- getcallingscript
- checkcaller
- use debug.getfenv instead getfenv for oth hook
[>] Usage of oth.hook
- Undetected hook of metamethod such as __namecall, etc
- Undetected hook of c function such as debug.info, etc
- Best pratices include hooking specific function instead hooking entire __namecall

[>] Updated to version-889d2588b25a43d1
[>] Improved setstackhidden
[>] Improved run_on_actor
[>] Small improvement on oth.hook
Note: oth.hook is not yet reliable on __namecall hook due to gc!
Improvement is being made on oth.hook!

[>] Updated to version-889d2588b25a43d1
[>] Improved setstackhidden
[>] Improved run_on_actor
[>] Small improvement on oth.hook
Note: oth.hook is not yet reliable on __namecall hook due to gc!

Metadata.Changelog:
[>] Updated for version-5aed1822f52c4b03
Volcano is now paid!

[>] Updated for version-5b077c09380f4fe6
[>] Fixed minor issues
All licenses has been compensated for 8 hours!

Core Changes
[>] Added multi instance support

UI Changes
[>] Added License expiration in Settings section.
[>] Added Multi instance selection.
[>] Preserved Editor state whenever changing tab.
[>] Improved Tab management design (Move, Rename, Duplicate, Delete)

Instance Limits
[>] Weekly is 5 and Monthly is 10

How to use Multi instance with Volcano?
1. Run Volcano first
2. Open multiple Roblox, recommended using https://github.com/ic3w0lf22/Roblox-Account-Manager
3. Attach Volcano
4. Enjoy!

[>] Updated for version-f8f53a67efca4c34
[>] Improved run_on_actor logic for serial phase
Happy new year!!

[>] Updated for version-f8f53a67efca4c34

Happy new year!!

[>] Updated for version-1588a9c58c674e38
All licenses that hasnt expired since 14 January 2026 is compensated for 7 days!

[>] Updated for version-db4634f0e27d4d36
All licenses that hasnt expired since 29 January 2026 is compensated for 4 days!
[>] Fixed some scripts not running properly
[>] Fixed some scripts not running properly

[>] Updated for version-df7528517c6849f7

We sincerely apologize for the recent downtime and have compensated all active users with 16 days added to their accounts. We are aware of some minor performance issues; however, we chose to bring the service back online rather than keep you waiting any longer. Our team is actively working to resolve these issues over the next few days. Thank you for your patience and understanding.
Also you can check Volcano documentation at docs.volcano.wtf
